attacks.name: Fruity Scent
attacks.description: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of Pokemon you find there and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle the remaining cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: String Shot
attacks.description: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokemon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.description: This Pokemon also does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Lively Cutter
attacks.description: If this Pokemon healed during this turn, this attack does 200 more damage.

attacks.name: Leaf Guard
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokemon takes 50 less damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Furtive Drop
attacks.description: Place 1 damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokemon.

attacks.name: Matcha Spin
attacks.description: If you have 6 or more Pokemon in your discard with the Ghost Veil Ability, place 4 damage counters on each of your opponent's Pokemon.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.description: Your opponent's Active Pokemon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Lava Wall
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokemon doesn't take damage from attacks by Pokemon that are Burned.

attacks.name: Best Punch
attacks.description: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Flame Legion
attacks.description: This attack does 40 more damage for each Benched Pokemon that has Fire Energy attached.

attacks.name: Hydro Jet
attacks.description: This attack does 30 damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokemon to 1 of your opponent's Pokemon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokemon.)

attacks.name: Falling Down
attacks.description: This Pokemon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Fossil Beatdown
attacks.description: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your Benched Pokemon with "Antique" in its name.

attacks.name: Aqua Return
attacks.description: Return this Pokemon and all cards attached to it into your hand.

attacks.name: Drain Fin
attacks.description: Heal 20 damage from this Pokemon.

attacks.name: Justice Knuckle
attacks.description: If your opponent has 1 Prize card remaining, this attack does 200 more damage.

attacks.name: Controlled Burn
attacks.description: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Bug Panic
attacks.description: Reveal the bottom 7 cards of your deck. This attack does 50 damage times the number of Pokemon that have the attack Bug Panic. Then, shuffle those Pokemon back into your deck and discard all other revealed cards.

attacks.name: Controlled Burn
attacks.description: Discard 2 cards from your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Heat Tackle
attacks.description: This Pokemon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.description: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Flash Barrier
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokemon by attacks from your opponent's Evolution Pokemon.

attacks.name: Sonic Edge
attacks.description: This attack's damage isn't affected by effects on your opponent's Active Pokemon.

attacks.name: Quick Dive
attacks.description: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokemon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokemon.)

attacks.name: Giga Electromagnetic Blaster
attacks.description: If this Pokemon doesn't have any Bolty [L] Energy attached, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Thunder Fist
attacks.description: This attack does 60 damage times the number of [L] Energy attached to this Pokemon.

attacks.name: Zepto Turn
attacks.description: Switch this Pokemon with 1 of your Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.description: This Pokemon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Unlimited Disposal
attacks.description: You may discard as many cards from your hand as you like.

attacks.name: All Out
attacks.description: If you have no cards in your hand, this attack does 160 more damage.

attacks.name: All Out
attacks.description: At the end of your opponent's next turn, discard the Defending Pokemon and all cards attached to it.

attacks.name: Psyshock
attacks.description: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokemon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Doll Catch
attacks.description: You may search your deck for any card and put it into your hand. If you do, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Soul End
attacks.description: If you have 13 or more Pokemon in your discard with the Ghost Veil Ability, choose 2 of your opponent's Pokemon and quadruple the number of damage counters on each of them.

attacks.name: Returning Lights
attacks.description: Search your deck for up to 3 Lampent and put them onto your Bench.

attacks.name: Phantom Maze
attacks.description: This attack does 50 more damage for each [C] in your opponent's Active Pokemon's Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Regretful Rage
attacks.description: If you have 4 or more Pokemon in your discard with the Ghost Veil Ability, this attack does 140 more damage.

attacks.name: Shadow Knot
attacks.description: This attack does 30 damage times the number of Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokemon's Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Ghost Blow
attacks.description: Place 5 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Rampaging Hammer
attacks.description: During your next turn, attacks used by this Pokemon deal 150 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokemon.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.description: Search your deck for 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

attacks.name: Fling Off
attacks.description: Your opponent switches their Active Pokemon with 1 of their Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Battle Claw
attacks.description: If your opponent's Active Pokemon is an Evolution Pokemon, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Gaia Impact
attacks.description: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokemon.

attacks.name: Night Raid
attacks.description: If any of your Benched Pokemon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 110 more damage.

attacks.name: Abyss Eye
attacks.description: If your opponent's Active Pokemon is affected by any Special Condition, it is now Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Bone Snipe
attacks.description: This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has a Special Energy attached to it.

attacks.name: Procurement
attacks.description: Search your deck for an Item card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Perplex
attacks.description: Your opponent's Active Pokemon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Brain Crush
attacks.description: If your opponent's Active Pokemon isn't Confused, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Skill Thief
attacks.description: If you have no cards in your hand, choose 1 of your opponent's Pokemon's attacks and use it as this attack.

attacks.name: Wheel Draw
attacks.description: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

attacks.name: Hunger Bomb
attacks.description: This attack does 40 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokemon.

attacks.name: Overhead Throw
attacks.description: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Shadow Whip
attacks.description: If any of your Benched Pokemon has any Shadowy Darkness Energy attached to them, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Diving Headbutt
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokemon takes 100 extra damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokemon.

attacks.name: Spiraling Envy
attacks.description: If this Pokemon has 2 or more damage counters on it, this attack does 90 more damage. Don't apply Weakness for this attack's damage.

attacks.name: Steel Cutter
attacks.description: Discard up to 2 Basic Metal Energy from your hand. This attack does 40 damage times the number of Energy discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Smash
attacks.description: Discard 1 Energy from your opponent's Active Pokemon.

attacks.name: Mirror Attack
attacks.description: If your opponent's Active Pokemon is a [M] Pokemon, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Dig And Break
attacks.description: Discard the top 2 cards from your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Maximum Drill
attacks.description: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack does 130 more damage.

attacks.name: Double Stab
attacks.description: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.description: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage and effects of attacks done to this Pokemon. If tails, this attack fails.

attacks.name: Feather Rondo
attacks.description: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokemon in play (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.description: Discard 1 Energy attached to this Pokemon.

attacks.name: Delivery Challenge
attacks.description: Flip 2 coins. If both are heads, search your deck for 1 Pokemon and put it onto your bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Metal Block
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokemon takes 100 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Evolution Pokemon.

attacks.name: Phantom Maze
attacks.description: This attack does 50 more damage for each [C] in your opponent's Active Pokemon's Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.description: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sonic Blast
attacks.description: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Poison Chain
attacks.description: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Steel Armament
attacks.description: Search your deck for a Basic Metal Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.description: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike.

attacks.name: Healing Pirouette
attacks.description: Heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crescent Purge
attacks.description: You may turn 1 of your face-down Prize cards face up. If you do, this attack does 80 more damage. (That Prize card remains face up for the rest of the game.)

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.description: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Illusory Hijacking
attacks.description: This attack does 60 damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon ex and Pokémon V in play.

attacks.name: Corrosive Winds
attacks.description: Put 2 damage counters on each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Destructive Beam
attacks.description: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rigidify
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance) .

attacks.name: Trifrost
attacks.description: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 110 damage to 3 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Miasma Wind
attacks.description: This attack does 100 damage for each Special Condition affecting your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Nosh
attacks.description: Heal 40 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Loom Over
attacks.description: This attack does 10 less damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Reaping Dash
attacks.description: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools and Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.description: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.description: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Breezy Gift
attacks.description: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck. If you do, search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Coated Attack
attacks.description: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: Syrup Storm
attacks.description: This attack does 30 more damage for each Grass Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.description: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sudden Scorching
attacks.description: Your opponent discards a card from their hand. If this Pokémon evolved from Salandit during this turn, your opponent discards 2 more cards.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.description: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ring of Fire
attacks.description: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Inferno Onrush
attacks.description: This Pokémon also does 60 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.description: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Flare Strike
attacks.description: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Flare Strike.

attacks.name: Garnet Volley
attacks.description: This attack does 180 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Power Splash
attacks.description: This attack does 40 damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Larimar Rain
attacks.description: Look at the top 20 cards of your deck and attach any number of Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: Splashing Turn
attacks.description: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sonic Edge
attacks.description: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.description: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Unleash Lightning
attacks.description: During your next turn, your Pokémon can't attack. (This includes new Pokémon that come into play.)
